_comment_purpose: Skeleton NIP-99 event for a <vertical>-pack listing. Replace every <PLACEHOLDER> and remove the _comment_* keys before publishing. Listings carry NO image tag and NO PII; binaries flow over MCP.
tags: tags below this line are recommended but not required; delete the ones you don't use
_comment_pow: before signing: mine NIP-13 PoW to >= 20 bits by varying the `nonce` tag
_comment_photos: no `image` tag in v1 listings — photos arrive in the buyer's agent only via MCP `request_<DOMAIN_PHOTO_OR_DOC>` tool calls returning ImageContent blocks
_comment_pii: the `content` field is part of the public listing; never put PII, exact addresses, or document scans in it
